task: Tighten the journals page UI, routing, memo CRUD, and analysis feedback.

branchDecision.note: fix/* requires an auditable trace. Branch creation was initially blocked by .git ref-lock permissions, then completed after .git write permission was granted.

validations.name: browser-script-syntax-check
validations.details: node --check passed for caqdas-interface.js, journal-entry.js, and journal-tabs.js after conflict resolution.

validations.name: eslint-targeted
validations.details: 0 errors, warnings remained in pre-existing console/no-unused-vars sites.

validations.name: npm-test
validations.details: 199 tests passed after the Codex review follow-up. npm test -- --ci was attempted earlier and failed because --ci is passed to node --test as an unsupported Node option.

threads.summary: Return after D1-only memo updates instead of falling through to Airtable.
Do not require Airtable after successful D1 deletes in D1-only contexts.

changes: Added Airtable configuration and Airtable record ID guards.
Returned success after successful D1 update/delete when Airtable is unavailable or the memo ID is local.
Added D1-only runtime tests for update and delete with seeded rec-style memo IDs.

continuationUpdate.task: Fix journal edit routing, replace remaining custom filter pills, render codebook tags from data, add codebook edit/delete, and replace browser delete confirmations with in-UI confirmation.
changes: Replaced remaining Nunjucks filter chips with GOV.UK radio controls.
Preserved project query context across journal view/edit routing.
Replaced browser confirm prompts for journal, memo and code deletes with inline GOV.UK confirmation UI.
Added codebook edit UI and DELETE /api/codes/:id support.
Mapped code tags through hydration and rendered data-backed tag values instead of literal Code/Path labels.
Restored journal entry action buttons to the Nunjucks template so generated HTML keeps edit/delete actions.

validation.details: node --check passed for journal-tabs.js, journal-entry.js, journal-entry-edit.js and reflection/codes.js.

validation.name: npm-run-lint
validation.details: Exit code 0; warning-level console/no-unused-vars findings remain across the repository.

residualRisks: No browser walkthrough was run for this continuation.
Production Airtable linked-record constraints may reject deletion of referenced codes.

limitations: Linear project status update creation was attempted after connector installation, but the backend rejected the exposed status-update tool as unavailable.

publicationUpdate.task: Commit and push the journal/codebook continuation changes to the PR branch.

journalEntryRouteFollowUp.task: Fix remaining journal entry view and edit route breakage.
changes: Changed journal entry and edit links to slash-terminated static routes.
Preserved project context on edit cancel and post-save redirects.
Added a source Nunjucks template for the journal edit page.
Registered the journal edit page in the GOV.UK page renderer.
Updated route-state tests to require the slash-terminated route contract and reject the no-slash contract.
Updated Linear RES-5 with a whole-PR description and current active follow-up state.
